svg.title: Transaction screen
svg.desc: Main reservation workspace: displays selected guest and reservation context, occupancy rows and room moves, charge and payment ledger lines, stay-specific notes that feed operational reports, and reservation actions such as re-booking and canceling; also includes print entry points for confirmation/folio/bill/cancellation outputs for the current stay.

g.text: Lila's Cabin — Jun 26–28 · M. Hill, J. Hill
